subject: [PATCH v7 11/15] mm/pagemap: add PAGE_IS_ACCESSED for RWP tracking

2026-06-29.patch_summary: This patch adds a new category to the pagemap API called PAGE_IS_ACCESSED, which tracks read-write protection (RWP) using a separate bit from the existing write-protected (UFFD_WP) bit. The change is necessary because 'has been written' and 'has been accessed' are distinct semantic signals that happen to share one PTE bit today due to shared infrastructure. The patch also updates documentation to reflect this new category and its meaning in different VMAs.
